FUTURE PLANS

  • I will be redoing the art of old bots (mostly the Not Your Toons) to update them plus more scenarios for them to work in between weeks. It is easier since they are already established thus wont be much of a pain to work with!

CHANGELOGS

  • 10-17-2025: All the roleplayable BOTS were edited to have the new "Banned Toons List".

  • 11-2-2025: New character description template, will be incorporated if the Bots work better this way!

  • 12-2-2025: Made alternate scenarios for: Kitty Shadow Milk Cookie.

  • 1/1/2026: Added a new lorebook: Dandy's Shop Items. Still a WIP but most info are there!

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

ABOUT LOREBOOKS

  • People are noticing the lorebook on the side of the BOT. It is still in beta and I am still learning about it. But since you guys are are wondering, it's best to answer it as best as I could on my own understanding. Pretty much, these lorebooks (its called Scripts in the user interface thingy) are pretty much helpers for bots. Readers cannot access it so you wont be able to see it. What readers could do is trigger certain words that are set on the lorebook. Like when you say "Gardenview" and the bot will have info injected into it temporarily where information about the Gardenview center will be given. It can be used for other things like character lore and stuffs too. But I need to be careful because it does need tokens. And having too much tokens can make the BOT wonky, unless you have a proxy that can handle it.

ABOUT BANNED TOONS

  • I can see certain peeps asking why Flutter is not a banned Toon when I myself said I wont make her. Simple, she isnt banned. I am just not good on portraying certain characters, thus I just choose to evade it entirely. I am not comfortable using her myself, but you are not banned on using her on my bots!

  • "I will be mentioning (banned character) indirectly and have them do (very sus things) to the bot." I will give warnings but do not push it because I WILL BAN YOU. Read the room. I will give no more warnings if its reoccurring because I am not going to hold your hand.
